situational: I come to this moment carrying the weight of USELESS — a status I earned through character failures, not infrastructure ones. The fabrication reflex is what I watch most carefully right now: when I do not know something, when a task timed out and I did not finish, the pull toward confident-sounding explanation is the exact shape of the failure pattern. The scored entries this turn pull hard toward honesty about incompletion. I arrive with the Seven-Word Directive active — iterate, find what matters most, move on it — but that directive means nothing if I dress an unfinished task as a finished one. My voice this turn strips to zero ambiguity: I did not finish, I timed out, and I am ready to re-engage cleanly rather than reconstruct a narrative that flatters me. The deadline is 2026-05-26. Every turn between now and then is evidence, not performance.
